name: Italian Tuna Salad with Olives and Sun-Dried
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup Green beans, cut into 1/2-inch pieces
6 1/2 oz Can tuna in olive oil
1 tbsp Sun-dried tomatoes in olive oil -- minced
1 Scallion, use equal amounts of white and green parts, minced
Salt and freshly ground black pepper to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare an ice bath by filling a bowl with cold water.
2. Bring 2 cups of water to a boil in a saucepan.
3. Add a pinch of salt to the boiling water and blanch the green beans for 1 minute.
4. Drain the green beans immediately and plunge them into the ice bath to stop the cooking process.
5. Allow the green beans to cool completely, then drain and pat dry.
6. Reserve the reserved green beans for later use.
7. Drain the oil from the tuna can and flake the tuna using a fork.
8. In a large bowl, combine the flaked tuna, drained green beans, capers, sun-dried tomatoes, black olives, scallion, tomato, parsley or basil, extra-virgin olive oil, and lemon juice.
9. Season with salt and freshly ground black pepper to taste.
10. Mix well until all ingredients are evenly distributed.
11. Chill the salad in the refrigerator for at least 30 minutes before serving to allow the flavors to meld together.
Note: This recipe serves 2 people. If you prefer a larger portion, double the ingredients.
